name: print-studio-opendesign
description: A modular Codex plugin for print-shop AI proofing: intake, material selection, layout proofing, calendar/card templates, commerce mockups, prepress QC, and delivery packaging.

interface.shortDescription: Print-shop AI proofing suite for cards, calendars, and small print products.
interface.longDescription: Print Studio OpenDesign turns client images into configurable print proofs. The plugin is split into focused skills for order intake, size/material selection, constrained AI layout, calendar/card rendering, white-background and ambiance mockups, prepress QC, and handoff packaging.
defaultPrompt: 帮我用插画做一套 5×7 贺卡打样
生成 24 种纸张材质选择预览
检查这套卡片是否适合印刷交付
